steps.title: Use the parallel-line slope rule
steps.content:
Parallel lines have equal slopes. Line $k$ has slope $3$, so line $j$ also has slope $3$:
$$y = 3x + b$$

steps.title: Plug in the point $(0, 1)$
steps.content:
$1 = 3(0) + b \Rightarrow b = 1$.

So line $j$ is $y = 3x + 1$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
